seo_default_description: Get OpenStreetMap tagging recommendations based on traffic sign combinations.
header_about_body: This tool helps to find the right {trafficSignTag} tag as well as recommended tags for the road that it applies to.
header_about_review: Please review all tags before updating OSM.
header_about_report: Please report issues or help with research
footer_project_part: This project is part of the
footer_inspired: It is inspired by the great but unmaintaned
page_select_sign_hint: Select a traffic sign to display recommended tags …
page_multi_modifier_warning: You selected more than one sign that modifies access or conditional tags which this tool does not handle, yet.
page_multi_modifier_followup: The tagging recommendations are very likely wrong. Please consult the
redirect_renamed: `{from}` was renamed to `{to}` which is the identifier this tool uses.
redirect_alternatives: All alternative identifiers for this sign: {list}
debug_help: This section is to help debug the tool.
opening_hours_wiki_block: Please use {#link to=|https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Conditional_restrictions|}the Wiki on conditional restrictions{/link} to check the correct format.
explicit_none_single_home_suffix: ) is marked to have no tagging recommendations apart from the {trafficSignKey} key.
explicit_none_single_suffix: is marked to have no tagging recommendations apart from the {trafficSignKey} key.
explicit_none_multiple_suffix: are marked to have no tagging recommendations apart from the {trafficSignKey} key.
page_tagging_qa_intro: This page helps maintain tagging suggestions in the
page_combinations_qa_intro: Review sign combinations and record feedback.
qa_filter_missing: All signs with missing tagging suggestions
qa_filter_explicit_none: All signs with explicit no tagging suggestions
qa_task_explicit_none: Mark sign as "has no tagging suggestion"
qa_no_tasks: Select filters and tasks above to generate GitHub issue text.
qa_task_results_summary: Task Results ({count}) – Copy those into a new Github Issue so the catalogue can be updated
qa_task_results_empty: Select a task for one or more signs in the table below.
combinations_no_match: No primary signs match this filter.
taginfo_intro: Compare tool recommendations with taginfo data.
wiki_intro: Compare tool data with the OSM wiki.
page_all_signs_intro: All the signs that are defined in this tool and
page_all_signs_package: the NPM package that it is using
page_tagging_qa_description: Review tagging suggestions per sign. Use focus and QA filters to find signs that still need tag recommendations. Record tasks below and copy results into a GitHub issue.
page_tagging_qa_showing: Showing {shown} of {filtered} signs (focus filter) · {total} total in catalogue.
wiki_page_intro: This page is to understand, debug and improve the trafficSigns object that is the source of data for this app.
combinations_intro: Select a primary sign, then review its modifier combinations. Record feedback and open a pre-filled GitHub issue.
combinations_select_primary_hint: Select a primary sign above to review its combinations.
